programme.title: P'tang Yang Klipperbang

programme.desc: A woman and her teen daughter accuse an estranged relative of assaulting them at a family party/A woman is suing her former friend for repossessing her truck; her friend argues that the vehicle was never insured.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.26
programme.desc: Intoxicated bride sues friend for face punch at wedding, accused teen claims self-defense/Woman accuses ex of cheating, he defends as moving on; dispute over living room set balance.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.31
programme.desc: The emotional burial of a pet Chihuahua leads to a violent, bloody assault between family members/A woman sues her ex-fiancé for a loan to buy a home. He claims she wrecked his truck while driving drunk, so he’s not paying.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.181
programme.desc: Two 18-year-old girls accused of spray painting each other’s cars trace their alleged vandalism back to high school issues. A 'tickling' incident between young lovers causes a shoulder injury and a dispute over treatment costs.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Walking Free
programme.desc: The story of David Camm, who was convicted in two murder trials -- each eventually overturned -- and was found not guilty in his third trial for the murder of his wife and two children.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Burden of Proof
programme.desc: Following the disappearance, in Jan. 1997, of 33-year-old Beverly Watson, her husband, Jim, became a prime suspect. Watson insisted that he was innocent. Police noticed that Jim was wearing makeup to conceal what appeared to be scratches on his face.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Ryan Ferguson: Wrongful Conviction
programme.desc: The case of Ryan Ferguson, who was released from prison in 2013, after nearly 10 years behind bars for murder. 48 HOURS team have been investigating the murder and the bizarre circumstances that put Ryan Ferguson in prison for the crime since 2006

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Blue River Murder
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the 2010 death of Stephanie Roller, a Colorado mother of three who allegedly went for a walk during a blizzard and was later found dead in a nearby river.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Mystery of Slide Mountain
programme.desc: A report that examines evidence and unanswered questions regarding a June 1, 1998 auto accident on Slide Mountain, near Reno, Nevada, that led to the death of Rinette Riella Bergna and left the driver, Rinette’s husband Peter with only minor injuries.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Temptation
programme.desc: In June 2007, Dewayne Barrentine met Tausha Fields and soon after they began living together. Tausha told him some unbelievable stories about herself – leading Barrentine to verify her stories online, which resulted in the uncovering of a homicide.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Casino
programme.desc: Guest star Jack Cassidy is Orin Kerr, an ex-hoodlum who now controls the largest gambling resort in the western hemisphere as a front for the underworld crime syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Trapped
programme.desc: Jim Phelps is struck on the head and loses his memory while trying to intercept an eight-million-dollar smuggling operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Break!
programme.desc: Carl Betz, Barbara Anderson, and Robert Conrad guest star alongside Jim Phelps who, with the aid of Barney's electronic wizardry, takes on the guise of a hot-shot pool hustler to break up an illegal gambling operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Two Thousand
programme.desc: Joe Collins is a nuclear scientist who is made to believe that he is a prisoner in the year 2000 and is about to be executed as part of the IMF's plans to learn where he has hidden enough plutonium to construct a dozen atomic bombs.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Deal
programme.desc: Robert Webber guest stars as Charles Rogan, a syndicate leader with the key to the five million dollar bankroll that will finance the overthrow the government of Camagua.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Party Gras
programme.desc: On a trip to New Orleans, Ton and Allen look to mix business with pleasure. They wage war with some locals at a tough auction, win a Mardi Gras unit that contains a confetti blaster and a modern calliope, then hit the town.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Tough as Nails
programme.desc: CJ seeks to disrupt Allen's search for serenity at a storage auction before the guy's head to a live auction to buy and sell. They uncover an unusual Marilyn Monroe statue, an industrial slip n' slide, and a bed of nails.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: To Pawn or Not To Pawn
programme.desc: On the brink of a major decision, Ton and Allen face-off with Carolyn at an auction in Covina. They win a "special effects unit" that contains big machines for crazy stunt work. The guys decide the fate of the shop.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Louisiana Purchase
programme.desc: In Louisiana, Ton and Allen encounter some salty locals at a shipping crate auction, and navigate choppy waters at a boat auction. After spending a lot of cash, they find a tactical blast shield and a bass fishing boat.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Holy Terror
programme.desc: Gunshots rip through the icy Idaho air, leaving a young woman gunned down in her doorway. Left behind: shell casings and a trail of footprints in the snow.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Iaeger

programme.desc: In 2005, the sleepy upstate town of Plattsburgh New York was gripped in terror when mom and pop furniture store owners David and Lorrie Donivan were found brutally stabbed to death.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: Years after Jessica Arredondo's body is found, another young woman is reported missing. Investigators uncover a link between the cases and stop a predator driven to kill.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: On a perfect New York summer day, a young wife mysteriously disappears. But when a hazy detail comes to light, this missing person's case turns into a homicide investigation.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: On a cosy couple's getaway to Bucks Lake, California, a young mother is killed in a snowmobile crash. Upon closer inspection, it appears it was no accident.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: In South Carolina's Lowcountry, a boat trip with friends turns into an unforgettable nightmare. It is a race against the elements to find a young woman who went overboard.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion

programme.desc: The murder of a beloved yoga instructor appears to be an open and shut robbery homicide until detectives find themselves deep in a murder investigation with one too many twists.

programme.desc: When a college girl is reported missing, police believe she may have just wandered off, but they are forced to reassess when blood is found in her boyfriend's bedroom.

programme.title: CBS Evening News
programme.desc: The CBS Evening News team shares the day's stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to the world.

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Pilfered Paper/Buster Gets Real
programme.desc: When Francine has a big paper over Thanksgiving, she copies from a website. There's nothing wrong with that, is there? Everyone loves the new Top Supermarket reality series on TV, except Arthur. Will it end his friendship with Buster?

programme.title: Arthur: Do You Speak George?/World Girls
programme.desc: Everyone at school is speaking their own made-up language, and George can't make sense of what anyone is saying. And it's the grand opening of World Girl World, which sells dolls from every country, and every girl in town is thrilled!

programme.title: Arthur: Grandpa Dave's Memory Album/Buster's Carpool Catastrophe
programme.desc: Grandpa Dave is moving closer to the family, but something isn't quite right--he's forgetting all sorts of things. And Muffy, Arthur and Buster are carpooling to their cooking class. Can they stop fighting and have fun?

programme.title: Arthur: Desk Wars/Desperately Seeking Stanley
programme.desc: When Mr. Ratburn moves Brain and Arthur away from their usual desks, it sets off a chain reaction resulting in the most explosive desk war in third grade history! And, Arthur is 8-years old now—does he still need his teddy bear?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Goes To Camp/Buster Makes The Grade
programme.desc: Arthur and his friends go to summer camp where it's strictly boys vs. girls. Next, Buster Baxter is everyone's favorite jokester. Unfortunately, though, Buster's grades aren't as good as his jokes, and Buster may have to repeat third grade.

programme.title: Arthur: Lost!/The Short, Quick Summer
programme.desc: One day, Arthur falls asleep on a bus and awakens in a strange part of town. Will he ever find his way home? Can he keep himself from crying? Next, summer vacation is over? What about all those great, fun things Arthur intended to do?

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Snow Mystery/Team Trouble
programme.desc: D.W. saves everything. But her most prized possession is a snowball from last winter. But now it’s disappeared! Then, Arthur, Francine, and Buster must do a report on ancient Rome--but can they work as a team to complete the assignment?

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Tale Spins/Prunella Gets It Twice
programme.desc: What happens when you combine Greek Mythology with D.W.'s imagination? Then, getting two Polly Locket dolls almost ruins Prunella's birthday party. That, and Francine's bad mood--why, she wouldn't even sing the Happy Birthday song!

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Rules/Meet Binky
programme.desc: Writing your own name in graffiti all over the school wouldn't be very smart, right? Binky says he didn't do it, so detectives Fern and Buster are on the case. Then, Binky is the newest, hottest, hippest pop music craze in Elwood City.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Perfectly Purple Day
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The children paint pictures, make purple flowers and plan a purple party for their friend Colleen.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is surprised by the first day of cold weather, Barney helps her see that winter is a wonderful time. On a hot summer day, Barney teaches BJ about all the activities you can do in the summer.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Make Music
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ have fun learning about music, rhythm and musical instruments. Barney introduces many different instruments and BJ dreams of one day becoming a rock 'n roll star. They discover that music gives everyone a happy feelin.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Hot! It's Cold!
programme.desc: Throughout the day, Barney and the children learn about "hot" and "cold," but the fun really begins when Barney turns the playground into a winter/summer wonderland!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Playing Games - No, No, No!
programme.desc: Baby Bop has trouble following the rules and taking turns while playing games. Barney and Riff help her learn how to follow the rules. In the end, Baby Bop and BJ have fun playing together, and Baby Bop learns that rules make games fun for everyone!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Keep On Truckin'
programme.desc: Barney's friends Baby Bop and BJ learn about trucks as they wheel out their favorites and explore the functions and purposes of various trucks. BJ likes helping with his tow truck and Barney helps them see what it's like to be a real truck driver.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Wonderful World of Colors and Shapes
programme.desc: Picture this! When Barney shows off his new painting, his friends are inspired to create their own art show. Discovering how to create new colors and draw shapes, Barney and his friends put on a super-dee-duper art show

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop wants Barney, BJ and the Park Kids to play with her instead of working in a garden. RIFF plays detective to track down the source of a mysterious sound in the Park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Family and Me
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Savage
programme.desc: Koby helps Hot Shot to train for the grueling next leg of the Speed Planet Cup, while Optimus Prime and Vector Prime answer a distress call from the Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Sand
programme.desc: Hot Shot takes a dangerous gamble in the next round of the Speed Planet Cup, while Sideways tries to pit the Autobots against the Decepticons against each other...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Champion
programme.desc: After the terrible injuries sustained in the last race, Hot Shot cannot finish the final race on his own... Leaving Coby to enter the tournament as Hot Shot's driver.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Ice
programme.desc: Bud, Lori and Coby encounter government scientist Professor Suzuki while investigating strange phenomena at the North Pole, while Starscream plans a new attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Honor
programme.desc: Leobreaker disobeys Optimus' direct orders and attacks Scourge. Although Scourge now respects Leobreaker, the incident has caused a rift between him and Optimus...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Primal
programme.desc: Scourge and Optimus Prime battle each other for the Jungle Planet Cyber Key with Override from Speed Planet and Lori from earth being the guest viewers.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Trust
programme.desc: In an attempt to confuse the Decepticons, Optimus makes duplicate cyber keys for each Autobot. Meanwhile Dr. Suzuki makes an amazing discovery at the North Pole.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Trap
programme.desc: The secret history of Earth and Cybertron is revealed with the awakening of monster-hunting Autobot Smokescreen/Crosswise. Meanwhile the Autobots are drawn into a cavern filled with ancient Decepticons...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Invasion
programme.desc: Starscream unleashes the ancient Decepticons in an attempt to find Earth's Cyber Planet Key, Optimus leads the Autobots in battle...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Retreat
programme.desc: The Minicons rescue the kids from the military, while Sideways learns the location of the Autobots' Earth base and leads every Decepticon to Coby's home town...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Revelation
programme.desc: Scourge frees Megatron from Starscream's trap and heads toward Earth. The Autobots must deal with Megatron and locating Starscream's location at the same time.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Angie & Tito
programme.desc: Angie and Tito live in a cramped apartment full of their kid's toys. They want a large, modern house they can grow into, close to downtown, with a gourmet kitchen and lots of closets. The Property Brothers come to help.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Matt & Krysten
programme.desc: Matt and Krysten are trading in their condo for a large modern house where they can put down roots. The Property Brothers come to the rescue helping them find a budget-friendly dream home that can be renovated on time.

programme.title: Property Brothers: James & David
programme.desc: James and David are desperate to escape their nightmare townhouse, the one with mountainous stairs beside a stinky sewage treatment plant. The Property Brothers come to the rescue helping them find a dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Parker & Francesca
programme.desc: Parker and Francesca live on top of each other in a tiny condo overlooking a concrete jungle. The Property Brothers come to the rescue helping them find a budget-friendly dream home that can be renovated on time.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Caitlin & Steve
programme.desc: Having sold their downtown condo, Caitlin and Steve are wearing out their welcome with friends in the ‘burbs. They want a big, open concept, eco-home within walking distance of all amenities.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Rose & Giancarlo
programme.desc: Rose, Giancarlo, and their daughters want a spacious, one-storey house with a gourmet kitchen close to good schools. The Property Brothers help them find a budget-friendly home with a little help from Cindy Crawford.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Return of Dregg
programme.desc: While the Turtles work on using fragments of the Vortex Crystal to stabilize their mutations, Lord Dregg plans to use the fragments to create another Vortex Crystal to power his Vortex Transporter.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Beginning of the End
programme.desc: While Raphael, Michelangelo, Donatello and Carter work on restoring Leonardo to his regular self, Mung steals all the plutonium from a power plant in order for Dregg to build a Plutonium Ray to turn Leonardo into a radioactive killer.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Power of Three
programme.desc: Mungg informs Dregg that he came across two individuals who claimed they were old acquaintances of the turtles: Shredder and Krang!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Turtle in Time
programme.desc: The Turtles', Shredder's and Krang's battles skills, powers, and memories are absorbed into Dregg.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles to the Second Power
programme.desc: Dregg and his crew plan an invasion of Earth to make it his new home base, but first he has to get his transporter chip back from Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Day the Earth Disappeared
programme.desc: With the city breaking apart, the Turtles head to the street to investigate and see the Dreggnaut appear in the sky. With Mung's help, Dregg reprograms the transporter to open a warp in space.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Lord Dregg launches a final attack on the Ninja Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtle Tracks
programme.desc: April O'Neil, ace reporter for Channel 6, investigates recent break-ins, allegedly by Ninjas, which have resulted in the thefts of numerous technologies.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Shredder
programme.desc: The Shredder kidnaps Splinter in an attempt to lure the Turtles to his own cause. In order to rescue Splinter the Turtles must enter the Shredder's mobile fortress and brave its dangerous weaponry.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Thing about Rats
programme.desc: Baxter Stockman, a mad scientist, is showing an exterminator his new invention: a rat catching robot called Mousers.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have a grand old time tearing down their Kapla block buildings, which they rebuild just as fast. Grizzy remarks that the she-bear he's in love with is impressed by the Lemmings' construction and makes believe that it's his work of art.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: In Teletubbyland, Tinky Winky was asleep, Dipsy was making some adjustments and Laa-Laa was eating Tubby Toast. But nobody knew what Po was doing.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Five voice trumpets rises and plays some lovely music for the Teletubbies, who dance around Home Hill. Two girls have brought some new Tropical fish.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It’s time for Tubby Toast. Dipsy and Laa-Laa are so excited, they bounce up and down on their seats so much they fall off. They sit up to watch some children watching some birds in a bird bath.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are feeling very happy. They run and dance around cheering and hugging. They stop to watch some children in South Africa looking at monkeys.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children sharing a story about a robot. Po wakes up after the other Teletubbies and does everything on her own.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa sit down to eat some Tubby Custard. Po wants some too. She tries to eat the other's Tubby Custard, but they won't let her.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the colour orange. Laa-Laa loves her ball, she chases it all over Teletubbyland announcing to Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Po that her ball is orange.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies bump tummies and then watch five girls dance a Kathak dance. The Teletubbies play a game and swap their favourite things, but they are very happy when they each have their own special favourite things back.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some Spanish children picking chillies. In Teletubbyland the Tubby Toast machine wasn’t working. Tubby Toast flies everywhere.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po & Laa-Laa burst out of the house for a Big Hug and then watch a group of children act out their story of a journey. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa wondered where Po was so they went to look. Laa-Laa finds Po lying asleep under a big tree.

programme.title: The Big Dino Dig
programme.desc: In this new episodic special Bob and the team tackle a big new job – building a dinosaur-themed fun park. With the help of park manager Tony Toberomi and new dumper truck Rubble, the team constructs a roller coaster, slide, train ride and flying ride.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s building a ‘drying tunnel’ for drying Annie seaweed. Muck passes Mr Beasley who’s having a spot of bother with his washing. He decides to build Mr Beasley a drying tunnel for his washing.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are building a bunkhouse for Farmer Pickles guests The Pickers! Micky, Vicky and Little Ricky are helping with the sunflower harvest. The cabin is to be made of logs so Lofty’s job is very important today, lifting and laying the logs.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The Team are converting Mr Sabatini’s windmill into a café. Roley is rolling the ground flat for all the tables and chairs while Bob makes the awnings. Roley hits trouble when molehills keep appearing where he’s just been rolling.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are building Sunflower Valley’s first geodesic dome. As Wendy has organised the dome and knows how it all fits together, Bob suggests that she might like to take charge of the job. Reluctantly Wendy agrees.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is erecting a tent to accommodate some newcomers to the valley. Mr Bentley is organising everything, but unfortunately leaves his phone with Spud who promptly declares himself ‘Mr Bentley’s Assistant’.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Travis is delighted to receive his own Talkie Talkie and can’t wait to make good use of it. Mr Beasley arrives in the valley with a load of yoghurt pots as he heard something on the radio about making them into a house.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Whilst Bob and the team build Annie Pickles new seafront house, Muck is worried that Scoop is a better digger than he is and decides to prove himself with a sandcastle competition.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Sabatini has decided to move from Bobsville to set up the Sunflower Valley bakery. Bob and the team are going to build him a new house close to the river. Muck asks if Spud can tag along as he’s been telling him exciting stories.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is rendering a wall for Mr Sabatini. The job is straightforward, but the finished result looks rather plain, so Bob offers to get some tiles from JJ’s yard to decorate it. While Bob is gone, Mr Sabatini demonstrates his soccer skills to Dizzy.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop has spent the night in Bobsville and is off back to Sunflower Valley early in the morning. Benny is desperate to go too so Scoop promises to come back and take him as soon as he can.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Train enthusiast Mr Bentley is away for the day and, in his absence, Mrs Bentley decides to surprise her husband by asking Bob to build him a brand new model railway in the shed.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s job today is to repair an eroded riverbank. There will be LOTS of mud to shift and Muck is beside himself with excitement. Before Muck can get stuck in, Bob needs him to fetch some equipment from JJ’s.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and crew are demolishing an old barn for Farmer Pickles, but as Lofty tests his demolition ball he accidentally damages one of the pillars at the entrance to Bob’s yard. Wendy offers to stay and repair this while Bob gets on with the day’s job.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: A new machine has come to the Valley – Packer the Delivery Truck. He’s to work with Farmer Pickles team. Farmer Pickles gives Packer his jobs and he sets off on his first delivery round.

programme.title: The Legend of the Golden Hammer
programme.desc: Our first sight of Fixham is in the episodic special The Legend Of The Golden Hammer. The Legend of the Golden Hammer consists of six stories in which Bob and his team tackle building jobs at six of Fixham’s key locations.

programme.title: 2022 TOUR Championship - Final Round
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy rallied from six shots behind Scottie Scheffler to capture the FedExCup for the third time.

programme.title: 2023 TOUR Championship - Final Round
programme.desc: Watch the final round of the 2023 TOUR Championship, where Viktor Hovland shot a 7-under par 63 to claim his sixth PGA TOUR victory and first FedExCup at East Lake Golf Club in Atlanta, Georgia.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.desc: Charlie Murphy joins Jake Kenyon for a chuck and a chat.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 4
programme.desc: This episode includes: Bad Chief, Locust Grove, Update: Pizza Man and Perpetual Partners.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: G.I. Guinea Pig, Bank Tunnel, Murder in the Park, Noreen Renier and Unknown Dad.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Canadian UFO, UD: Brenda's Bunch, Dropped Off DOE & UD, Larry's Rampage & UD and Priceless Search & UD

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 1
programme.desc: Unsolved Mysteries covers crimes, paranormal events, tales of lost love, ufo's, and unexplained history. This episode includes: Thumbs & Update, Marsh & Update, Conway, Honeymoon Bones and Dottie.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: A Taxing Death
programme.desc: After heading out for a routine day of appointments, Montana state auditor Walter Sullivan disappears. Nine days later, his body is found at the bottom of a cliff beside his mangled car.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: The Ladykillers
programme.desc: Rose Swartwood, an elderly woman living alone in a New York project, is stabbed to death late one night in a frenzied attack. For the next two years the case remains unsolved.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Memphis Police have a prime suspect in the gruesome killings of two prostitutes. But as they prepare to make an arrest, psychic Carol Pate pays the cops a visit.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Homestead Horror
programme.desc: Someone is attacking the elderly female residents of the depressed mill town of Homestead, Pennsylvania. Over the past four years, five women have been raped and assaulted in their own homes.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Bad Company
programme.desc: A Vancouver area nightclub owner disappears into thin air. Police believe he’s fled the city, traveling incognito under one of his many known aliases.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Staunton Stalker
programme.desc: The college town of Staunton, Virginia is being terrorized by a stocking-masked, knife-wielding serial rapist.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Tunnel Vision
programme.desc: Two teenage girls are killed horribly, months apart, on the outskirts of the northern Canadian city of Thunder Bay.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: How Dark the Woods
programme.desc: A lazy day at the lake in upstate New York turns to panic when a five year-old boy disappears into the woods.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Vision of Murder
programme.desc: A quaint New Jersey town is rocked when a local nurse, Betty Cornish, is found bludgeoned to death in her apartment.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "A very strange place"
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted team investigates a venue with some amazing history and some bizarre incidents. Everything from unexplained footsteps to apparitions has been witnessed here; and for two members of the crew, it will be a venue they won't forget.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Lie of the Land
programme.desc: Sue Nicholson and Deb Webber investigate one of the most complex and intriguing cases ever featured - did Waikato man Jason Dark commit suicide or was he murdered, as his family believes?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: In this episode of Sensing Murder we learn about the murder of Angela Blackmoore, a 21 year old woman with a 2 year old child. The child was not harmed and the killer has not been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Without Warning
programme.desc: This week’s episode of Sensing Murder promises greater co-operation between psychics and police, attempting to uncover the truth about the death of 18-year-old apprentice plumber Regan O’Donoghue, who was killed in a hit and run in 2007.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Last Orders
programme.desc: In 1993, devoted father Kevin O'Loughlin came face to face with the dark side of sunny Nelson when he was brutally stabbed to death after a night out on the town.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Now You See Me
programme.desc: 26-year-old deaf woman Alexa Cullen vanished from her home in Manaia, on the Coromandel Peninsular in 1995. She had a history of hitch-hiking and police suspected she’d run away. But three years later, ominous rumors began circulating in the community.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Judgment Day
programme.desc: TAPS calls in Bruce Tango, father of Dave Tango, to help investigate a place close to his heart, the Union County Courthouse, a historic property in Elizabeth, NJ.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Little Drummer Boy
programme.desc: TAPS has received an urgent call for help from a Chicago community center whose patrons are being chased away by a variety of menacing spirits.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Bat Out of Hell
programme.desc: This week TAPS heads to Thousand Island, NY to investigate a 4-acre private island and is joined by the \\" King of Rock and Roll\\" himself, Meatloaf.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Glimmer Men
programme.desc: TAPS heads to Quincy, Massachusetts to investigate the unexplainable paranormal events that are haunting a 716 foot long ship.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Fort Henry
programme.desc: This week, TAPS is called in to investigate the Fort Henry, where it once served as a cornerstone for Canada's military defense and execution site.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Death Room
programme.desc: PRS arrives in Ryan's hometown to help the new owner of an old southern plantation unearth its dark history.?A painful family secret reveals a tale of greed and neglect, and the team must help free its unwilling victim from her spiritual prison.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Sickness
programme.desc: Something is making Lisa and her family sick. Is it natural or paranormal? Ryan and the team uncover the tragic history surrounding Lisa's home--with shocking connections to respiratory illness.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Sixth Sense
programme.desc: A worried mother calls the Paranormal Research Society to help her son Matthew, a boy who sees dead people. Matthew's story strikes a chord with team leader Ryan Buell who also experienced paranormal activity as a child.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Firehouse
programme.desc: Everyone from the chief to the trainees at the Clementon Fire Department is convinced that the ghost of a former member is haunting their firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Woman in the Window
programme.desc: Ryan and his team lend paranormal assistance to a family who lives in a historic home that was once a part of the Underground Railroad. Does the answer to their haunting lie in the mysterious tunnels beneath the house?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room & Board
programme.desc: The owners of a vacation lodge in the remote town of North Hudson, NY, feel their woodsy getaway is plagued by negative spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Messenger
programme.desc: Kelli and her husband Riley are frightened in their coastal Oregon home. They are plagued by a headless apparition and often hear mysterious noises that resemble cries for help from the dark corners of their house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey
programme.desc: PRS delves deep into the pine barrens of the Garden State to separate myth from reality about the so-called "Jersey Devil." Accompanied by a cryptozoologist the team interviews eye witnesses and experts in search of the truth.

programme.title: Ancient High House
programme.desc: The team are followed around this ancient house said to be the haunt of many long dead spirits. The team are soon put to the test as Gregg feels something is playing with him.

programme.title: Leopard Inn Pt 1
programme.desc: The upper room of the Leopard Inn are now a set of deserted rooms and corridors that were once a Victorian Hotel, although way past its heyday some of the borders seem to have stayed. This episode sees the team get their most convincing evidence to date.

programme.title: Leopard Inn Pt 2
programme.desc: The team continue in the abandoned old hotel but something seems to be stalking them. Yvette has a close encounter alone in the corridors with disembodied footsteps walking toward her and aggressive poltergeist activity plagues the rest of the team

programme.title: Leopard Inn Pt 3
programme.desc: In the final part of their investigation into the abandoned old hotel above the Leopard Inn, Yvette and her team are tested again to their very limits.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Yvette starts the new series with an investigation at the haunted Eden Camp. Strange noises and an unknown force try to separate the team. Can they endure the entire investigation, or will the paranormal activity prove too much for them to handle?

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Prophecy, Couch Potato, Love Over the Counter, Imaginary Friend, Last Man on Earth.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Wealthy Widow, The Witness, The Accident, Bad Dreams, Mental.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 13

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 3

programme.title: A Haunting: The Forgotten
programme.desc: A family begins renovating their new house, unaware of a ghostly inhabitant that hates change.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Protector
programme.desc: A mother and daughter both believe their house is haunted. But while the mother believes it's the spirit of her murdered boyfriend, her daughter believes it's much darker. Paranormal experts investigate and uncover an epic battle between good and evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Lake Club Horror
programme.desc: The Lake Club is transformed into a rock n roll nightclub with mysterious happenings.

programme.title: A Haunting: Conjuring Evil
programme.desc: Harold and Cindy have found the perfect retreat in suburban Alaska for their family. But after their daughter begins to experiment in witchcraft, she unknowingly attracts the attention of a dark entity. Harold calls in experts to help reclaim the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Wicked Eviction
programme.desc: Tammy Shea, a single mother of three, relocates her family for a fresh start but her dream turns to a nightmare when her family is antagonized by multiple entities. Desperate, Tammy finds a paranormal team who reveal the true evil in the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Mother's Terror
programme.desc: When Jeanette's firefighter husband dies in the line of duty, she moves her daughters to a rustic hamlet in Long Island to start anew. Shortly after moving in, an evil entity lashes out at her daughter, Jeanette refuses to quit without a fight.

programme.title: Big Momma's House

programme.title: Joe Somebody

programme.title: Groomzilla
programme.desc: A woman is surprised and dismayed when her fiance takes the planning of their wedding too seriously.

programme.title: In A Day

programme.title: P'tang Yang Klipperbang
programme.desc: Alan is a socially awkward 14 year old who is obsessed Ann Lawton, a girl in his class. He becomes friends with the groundsman Tommy, whom he sees as some sort of war hero.

programme.title: Jabberwocky

programme.title: P'tang Yang Klipperbang
programme.desc: Alan is a socially awkward 14 year old who is obsessed Ann Lawton, a girl in his class. He becomes friends with the groundsman Tommy, whom he sees as some sort of war hero.

programme.title: Young Guns
programme.desc: In a lawless and violent time, six young outcasts are hired by an English merchant as 'regulators' to guard his ranch against the mob, a corrupt and powerful ring.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Plague Carrier
programme.desc: Earp and Dr. McCarty urge a doctor to open a practice in Dodge City but when smallpox breaks out they learn he isn't licensed.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: A Murderer's Return
programme.desc: Convict Dobie Jenner arrives in Tombstone after being released from Yuma prison for murder. When his old mining partner George McKean sees him in town, he tells Earp to run Jenner out of town

programme.title: Invitation To A Gunfighter
programme.desc: In New Mexico, a Confederate veteran returns home to find his fiancée married to a Union soldier, his Yankee neighbors rallied against him and his property sold by the local banker who then hires a gunman to kill him.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Fort Bowie: Urgent
programme.desc: Officials rush to send word to a bride that an escaped criminal wants to stop her wedding.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Suzie
programme.desc: A husband and wife catch trouble when they allow an Apache chief's granddaughter to stay with them.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Quest For Akhenatens Tomb
programme.desc: Jack Hunter is abducted blindfolded to a Turkish US base to be recruited by the NSA, told his mentor was killed because Albert Littmann's Russian mob employer Doridanov want the ancient Osiris-weapon.

programme.title: Banana Joe: Banana Joe

programme.title: Gleaming The Cube
programme.desc: A young avid skateboarder uncovers a conspiracy while investigating his adoptive brother's mysterious death.

programme.title: Watching Over You

programme.title: Strange But True
programme.desc: Five years after the tragic death of her boyfriend, a woman arrives on the doorstep of his family claiming she is pregnant with his child.

programme.title: Living in Fear
programme.desc: A newly married bride travels to her husband's hometown for the reading of his father's will. When she discovers that the townspeople suspect her husband of a murder committed twenty years ago, she has her doubts about the man she's committed her life to.

programme.title: Tornado Warning
programme.desc: Aliens attack Earth, using deadly electrical tornadoes as weapons. A farmer, his brilliant high school daughter, and a tornado blogger race against the clock to find a way to thwart the horrific invasion.

programme.title: Robot Apocalypse

programme.title: Apocalypse of Ice
programme.desc: Already in the throes of a viral pandemic, a massive polar vortex threatens to cover nearly all of Earth in ice.

programme.title: 40 Days and Nights

programme.title: The Lost Medallion

programme.title: Bogus

programme.title: Slow Moe

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a reality TV star dies at a premiere, each of her co-stars becomes a suspect.

programme.desc: The CSI team investigates two unusual cases, one involving the suspicious death of a go-cart racer who took his hobby to the highway and paid the price with his life, and a murder at a hip new restaurant where patrons dine in the dark.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of an entire family, except for one daughter, who supposedly is possessed by the devil.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: In Part One of a Two-Part crossover episode to conclude on Without A Trace, a kidnap victim from New York who went missing six years ago may be the same boy whose death Grissom and the CSI team are investigating in Las Vegas.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A suspect from Sara's past returns, causing her to question her future as a CSI.

programme.title: Scorpion: Lighthouse of the Rising Sun

programme.title: Scorpion: Nerd, Wind and Fire

programme.title: Scorpion: Dumbster Fire

programme.title: Scorpion: Gator Done

programme.title: The Family

programme.title: Tyler Perry's A Madea Christmas

programme.title: Boo! A Madea Halloween

programme.title: A Window in London

programme.title: Blithe Spirit

programme.title: Medium: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 2

programme.title: Medium: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 3

programme.title: Medium: The Man In The Mirror

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 224
programme.desc: Can watering plants with microwaved water kill them? Can you put out a fire on a lake by turning a boat at an angle? Can metronomes started at different times sync together?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 57
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a whirlpool really kill somebody? Can a snow plough driving down the road push enough air to flip a passing car over?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Behind lace-curtained windows and beneath sensible haircuts lurked evil. Appearances were deceptive. We did not notice these female killers walking by. These women wore a mask of sanity.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people’s babies, they spilt blood for money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Trail
programme.desc: The disappearance of young women triggered a search that spanned the Pacific Northwest. A massive media campaign failed to locate the drifter, who first charmed then killed them. As investigators followed his trail, he always stayed one step ahead.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Firefight
programme.desc: In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Moving Target
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: Two young boys were the only witnesses to their mother's murder. The horrible crime appeared unmotivated, senseless and random.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: These DNA Results Will Floor You
programme.desc: Korey says his girlfriend Dominique is a cheater and his suspicions about her job have caused major problems in their relationship. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin is unfaithful!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
programme.desc: Kendra is on a mission to save herself from her toxic boyfriend Chris. At 17, Kendra is pregnant with his sixth child. Kendra has tried almost everything including kicking him out of their house, but he not only argued back but assaulted Kendra as well.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Dennis claims his ex-girlfriend Kendal keeps tied down with pregnancy lies! He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve’s DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Not the Man You Think I Am
programme.desc: Sean says his wife has made him so angry that he’s put her in the hospital over 10 times. Sean’s also got a secret of his own — he is really a she! Can Steve help Sean iron out his issues?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: This Should Be Explosive...
programme.desc: Katrina believes her sister Kendra’s boyfriend is a cheater and having sex with her best friend Nay-Nay! Later, John returns to the stage with a shocking update!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Results Revealed: Did She Cheat?
programme.desc: Justin is convinced that girlfriend Lainie has been cheating on him, and more importantly that he’s not the father of their child. But his own insecurities have led him to turn violent. Also, Steven doubts whether Ashley’s child is his.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Dr. Watson and the inspector are led to a little shop when Holmes goes missing.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes helps to track down a killer who leaves clues next to the women he kills.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A school boy vandalizes church steps with faculty names, that are then later found dead.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An advice columnist turns to Holmes when a man badly beats him and threatens a young woman's life.

programme.title: The Pearl of Death
programme.desc: When a valuable pearl with a sinister reputation is stolen, Sherlock Holmes must investigate its link to a series of brutal murders.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes investigates a supposed suicide when the widow suspects it's mysterious.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson stay the weekend at Winthrop Manor, to find out who is threatening Mr. Winthrop.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Critical Evidence
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives: For Love Or Money
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Presumed Dead
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Patterns Of Guilt
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay puts aside the battle of the sexes and switches the chefs to even out the teams. The teams are put to the test during a lunch service cooking for a group of highly demanding customers.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: On the restaurant's fifth night, Chef Gordon Ramsay has the contestants make and serve an entire Italian-themed menu.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: As the teams prepare for their sixth dinner, chef Ramsay tells them that each team must create its own menu.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The wannabe chefs must combine their skills and work as individuals for the first time. The prize is a trip with Chef Ramsay to get a taste of the restaurant at the Red Rock Casino Resort.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining contestants must create a meal fit for service in 15 minutes out of a tray of leftovers from the previous night.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The final three contestants must serve an entire dining room.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Blood Sport: The Bondi Gay Murders
programme.desc: In the late 1980s and early 1990s a series of violent murders took place near Sydney’s famous Bondi Beach.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Death in a Heartbeat / The Body in the Bag
programme.desc: CI examines the Dr. Victor Chang extortion murder as well as the horrific Jane Doe Case where a girl is found lying on the side of the road of an inner Sydney suburb wrapped in two plastic garbage bags.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Thrill Kill: The Janine Balding Murder
programme.desc: On a September night in 1986, two police officers climbed through a barbed-wire fence beside the F4 freeway at Minchinbury in Sydney’s west.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Disappearance of Donald Mackay
programme.desc: A small group of local criminals with mafia connections were making vast fortunes in the famous NSW Riverina irrigation district from marijuana plantations.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Assassination of John Newman
programme.desc: John Paul Newman was a member of the New South Wales state parliament and a member of the seat of Cabramatta.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Easy Rider
programme.desc: What looks like a routine pick-up turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit, as well as quality nail care as Dog and company track down a fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend with one too many friends in his close knit community.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Midnight Run
programme.desc: This fugitive has a bad reputation and a knack for running from the law. The pursuit has Dog and team traveling through an urban dystopia of suspicion, false leads and mistrust.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Hunt for Santa
programme.desc: Dog decides he needs to help his son Garry believe in Santa Claus again. So now the Dog, with a posse expanded to include his children and grandchildren, sets off on a hunt through the Colorado Rockies for Santa Claus himself!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Call Waiting
programme.desc: Dog's target for today has been in trouble with the law since he was a juvenile. And he seems willing to use any trick in the system to avoid capture by Dog. In this match of wits, will Dog prevail?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Kid Stuff
programme.desc: A fugitive from justice is on the lam and it's Dog's job to find him. When they hit the last known address they discover he already has pulled up stakes and left no forwarding address. The posse's one hope is to locate his girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Easy Does It
programme.desc: There is a running joke in the posse that every time Bobby Brown asks them for help with a fugitive, he always promises them it's "an easy one," but the hunts end up being epic searches.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: Dog believes in safety first, and today's hunt puts this philosophy to the test. The fugitive's problem with anger management increases the dangers of their already risky line of work. Dog warns the crew to be ready for anything as they head out.

programme.title: The Game: A Swan Song For Rick And Tasha...
programme.desc: After getting back together, Blue and Keira run into a slight problem when Blue starts to believe that their relationship is contributing to his poor performance.

programme.title: Run's House: Blog Wild
programme.desc: Rev tricks the girls into coming back East for work so that he and Justine can spend time with them. JoJo helps Diggy bring more traffic to his blog.

programme.title: Run's House: Tapper's Delight
programme.desc: Vanessa and Angela nurture Russy's new passion: tap dancing. Diggy plays his sisters into getting him a mini-fridge for his bedroom. Rev tries to babyproof the house.

programme.title: Run's House: An Office He Can't Refuse
programme.desc: Rev tries to become an office worker at the remarkable Global Grind. Diggy's clean freak behavior borders on germaphobia.

programme.title: Run's House: Mother Smother
programme.desc: Diggy and Russy get annoyed by their Mom getting in their business while older siblings Angela and Vanessa don't mind Justine's ways. JoJo helps Rev find a new wardrobe.

programme.title: Run's House: The Puppy Whisperer
programme.desc: Justine and the boys try to train their dog Pal to convince Rev they're worthy of another dog. JoJo cooks healthy fried chicken for his parents.

programme.title: Run's House: Hall of Fame
programme.desc: Rev tries to figure out what Run DMC getting inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame is all about. Angela and Vanessa celebrate the 2-year anniversary for Pastry.

programme.title: Run's House: Series Premiere
programme.desc: Daughter Angela is graduating from high school, and Run plans to reward her for being a straight-A student and the family's "role model" by throwing her a party.

programme.title: Run's House: The Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: Run invites an emerging hip-hop band, Union Turnpike, to the house to strategize their pitch to Russell Simmons' new music label.

programme.title: Run's House: Chicks Fly the Coop
programme.desc: Run's blood boils upon finding that his backyard pool house has become filled with family junk. He vows to clean it out, which unleashes conflict with every family member who wants to hang onto some possession.

programme.title: Run's House: Go for the Gold
programme.desc: Run often talks about how much he loves to win, but it's not until we see his family compete against one another that we understand that the drive to dominate runs thick in the Simmons blood.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bullying Bulldog
programme.desc: Bulldog Buster is prone to biting and growling. Sadie, a 3 month old Beagle/terrier mix, is frightened of trash cans. Lacey develops anxiety at 11 years of age.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Maxwell, Brooklyn, and Tipper
programme.desc: A spoiled Welsh Sealyham Terrier has dominance issues; an excitable English Mastiff has behavioral issues, and a territorial Tibetan Terrier needs help accepting other dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Anti-Social Sasha
programme.desc: Sasha, a pound pup, is perfect in the house, but outside she shows aggression towards other dogs. Angler, a Lab, is blind, and exhibits strange behavior around food.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Sophie & Daisy
programme.desc: Sophie, a Sheltie-Golden nix, tries to nip at the heels of her owner’s horse. Daisy has an annoying problem – she tries to “hump” various members of the Benda family.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Special: 100th Episode Celebration
programme.desc: Participants from more than 200 stories featured on Dog Whisperer parade down the red carpet to celebrate the 100th Episode of Dog Whisperer with Cesar Millan.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Greta & Hoss, Storm, and Chula
programme.desc: Cesar helps a young Akita control his aggression; Newfoundland is the world's pickiest eater; two-year old Shiba Inu has a knack for bolting out open doors.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.181

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.114
programme.desc: Man faces assault charges after altercation with son/Ex-fiancé sued for rent and unpaid loans.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.246

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.252
programme.desc: Attending a golf tournament becomes a source of contention between ex-lovers when payment for a plane ticket is challenged. When students move out of a shared apartment, their parents are left to fight over rent and damaged credit.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.33
programme.desc: Slashed tires, alleged slander on the internet, and a fight over children’s Christmas gifts come into play when ex-lovers end a rocky relationship.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.10
programme.desc: Dog breeder accused of misrepresenting breed; teacup Chihuahua weighs over 12 pounds/Underage drinking during basketball damages car, sparks liability dispute.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.39
programme.desc: Ex-lovers dispute Suzuki motorcycle purchase, crash, and cancelled insurance.Young man arrested for assault, fails drug test, violates probation, bailed out by girlfriend; he claims bailout was birthday gift.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.154
programme.desc: A man says he was thrown on top of a car by a club bouncer after being wrongfully accused of hitting someone in the bathroom. A woman sues her twin brother for allegedly drinking, driving her car without permission, and wrecking it.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.198
programme.desc: A teenager, awarded a scholarship, admits to stealing a phone and erasing contacts. Another teen is accused of urinating in ex-friend's gas tanks as a joke.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.29
programme.desc: Siblings dispute deceased grandmother's estate, personal property, and damages from alleged mutual assault/Woman sues ex-boyfriend for alleged life-threatening phone call over broken apartment lease, involving alleged marijuana and meth use.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.133
programme.desc: Woman sues ex-friend for damaging Pontiac Grand Prix she was selling; ex-friend countersues for car payments. Parents fight over sick child's medication; neighbor testifies helping administer meds.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Temptation
programme.desc: In June 2007, Dewayne Barrentine met Tausha Fields and soon after they began living together. Tausha told him some unbelievable stories about herself – leading Barrentine to verify her stories online, which resulted in the uncovering of a homicide.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mr. Wonderful
programme.desc: Nicknamed "Mr. Wonderful" by one of his victims, Matt Mathews was everything to the women who lost both their hearts and bank accounts to the prolific con artist. Married at least 11 times, Mathews is believed to have scammed hundreds of people.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in Spokane
programme.desc: A report that focuses on the murders in Spokane, Washington over a period of a little more than two years (1997 - 1999) of at least a dozen women, mostly prostitutes.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Texas Confidential
programme.desc: A report on the 1997 murder of Doris Angleton, the wife of a successful Houston, Texas bookie. Doris’ husband Bob who claimed that his brother Roger was Doris’ killer, was tried for the crime in state court and acquitted. But the case did not end there.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Law and Mrs. Shelton
programme.desc: A report on Catherine Mehaffey Shelton, a criminal defense attorney from Dallas. She has been practicing law in Texas for nearly three decades and making headlines for nearly as long, primarily because strange things happen to the men in her life.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Raging Son
programme.desc: A cell phone captures the murder of a Weight Watchers executive by a Wall Street lawyer.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Deal
programme.desc: Robert Webber guest stars as Charles Rogan, a syndicate leader with the key to the five million dollar bankroll that will finance the overthrow the government of Camagua.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Leona
programme.desc: Robert Goulet guest stars as Joe Epic, a syndicate crime leader and key figure in an IMF plan to free a captured undercover agent.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: TOD-5
programme.desc: To locate a terrorist ring called Alpha Group, the IMF convinces turncoat intelligence agent Gordon Holt (played by guest star Peter Haskell) that he's been exposed to the stolen biological weapon he's been hired to deliver.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Cocaine
programme.desc: William Shatner guest stars as Joe Conrad, a drug dealer who becomes the unwitting dupe of the Impossible Missions Force in their plan to capture the largest shipment of cocaine ever brought into the country.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Underground

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Once a Pawn a Time
programme.desc: Ton and Allen discover that owning a pawn shop is way more trouble than they expected. With bills stacking up, even an antique ammo collection and some classic football helmets may not be enough to put the guys in the black.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rock-et to Me!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen end up in a turf war at a Hollywood auction and at odds with each other over whether to gamble on what could be an antique slot machine. Allen attempts to fly a jetpack.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen vs. Ton
programme.desc: When Ton and Allen find themselves bidding against each other at an auction, the former partners battle it out in an epic showdown that leaves the fate of the pawnshop and their friendship in question.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Ton and Allen quarrel over bidding strategy at a rare auction on Catalina Island and must race against the clock to unload a one man submersible that could be worth big money… if they can make it work.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes of a Child
programme.desc: A loving, churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My, Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Donald Ott is found shot to death, friends tell police he didn’t have an enemy in the world. But when Lt. Joe Kenda speaks with family, he learns of a relative who might hold the key to the mystery.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana field, Brian Davis's body is found at what seems to be an attempted robbery scene. However, a timely afternoon rainstorm uncovers an elaborate plot.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: A powerful thunderstorm hits a small Illinois town overnight as a wealthy couple is shot dead in their sleep. Detectives face challenges from the weather while searching for clues, but the storm may provide unexpected leads to catch the killer.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: CCTV and GPS exposed Kaitlin Armstrong for Mo Wilson's murder. In the UK, CCTV and digital forensics led to Liam Smith's killers.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In San Antonio, Christopher Duncan leaves his apartment never to return home. Police have little to go on until surveillance footage offers up the possible identity of a dangerous killer.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In 2016, car salesman Hufracio Arteaga was found stabbed to death in his Michigan City office, and surveillance cameras from a nearby building could potentially help investigators reveal the killer.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In 2015 care worker Torrance Cheeves is found stabbed to death in his Texas home. With no suspects and a trail of puzzling evidence, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area for answers.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Ronald Glenn West: The 22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: When two suburban housewives are killed in their homes within a week of each other in May 1970, it leaves Toronto in fear.

programme.title: Crime Stories: William Fyfe: The Killer Handyman
programme.desc: A man who was once accepted into a small Quebec community turns out to be a murderer, whose crimes cover nearly twenty years.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Casebook Rapist
programme.desc: An international student is found raped and murdered in the bathroom of her high-rise apartment.

programme.title: Crime Stories: David Shearing: The Wells Grey Gunman
programme.desc: In August of 1982, six members of the Bentley/Johnson family disappear in the Wells Grey National Park without a trace.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Menthol Murderer
programme.desc: A week-long search for a missing 10-yr-old Indiana girl ends sadly with her body being discovered in a nearby stream.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A sixteen-year-old girl was killed by her mother and father, in her own home. Her parents said they acted in self-defence, but the forensic evidence indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A mysterious computer bug pushes a thriving company to the brink of collapse. Can forensic investigators determine if the crash was the result of sabotage?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: During a routine motorcade for the Queen's US visit, two security cars collide and agents are killed. Investigators reach different conclusions as to the cause of the crash.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1993, an Amtrak train crashed, crossing Alabama's Bayou Canot bridge. Forty-seven passengers and crew were killed. Investigators hunt for clues as to the cause of the crash.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a fire erupted at King's Cross Underground, investigators were able to pinpoint the cause. Could they explain why it became a blazing inferno, killing 31 people?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A discarded sleeping bag, containing bloody sneakers and a purse, leads police to the body of a young woman. The autopsy and crime scene were analysed, but it would be a mark found on the victim's body that would enable police to track the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is killed while walking her dogs in the woods. She has no enemies and her husband has an alibi, so police assume it was a hunting accident until a strange letter turns up, allegedly written by the woman before her death.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The discovery of vital evidence, more than 2,000 miles away from a murder victim's body, helps detectives piece together the case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A talented television news anchor was shot to death outside her home. It appeared to be a crime of passion, perpetrated by an obsessed fan. A police dog tracked the scent of the killer through the adjacent woods and back to the crime scene.

programme.title: Pointless: Episode 64

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Digital forensics, traditional police work and a good old fashioned stake out stop a killer in his tracks, when all he's left is a digital trace.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the 35-year investigation and forensic advances that identify Rosa's savage killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of a sadistic crime and how investigators brought the merciless attacker to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation to catch a serial rapist and how advanced DNA technology finally tracked him down.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: How investigators uncovered what happened in the moments leading up to the death of Jchandra Brown.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The competitors waste no time getting stuck into the fray in the four way melees, with one robot seemingly dominating the competition. The house robots may be a little rusty as a robot launches an attack.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side

programme.desc: Dr Scott Miller helps Ali with her dog Mabel, who has developed a painful limp. A Labrador with three legs is developing another worrying mass. A hedgehog pet needs to go on a diet. And 16 tortoises need microchipping.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The competition intensifies as the remaining ninjas take their shot at the finals course, and the elite few who move on to the top eight compete in a playoff bracket where they race head-to-head on the Power Tower to determine the winner of $100,000.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Jill Dando
programme.desc: Documentary examining the unsolved murder of British TV presenter and newsreader Jill Dando, who was shot outside her house in Fulham, London, in 1999.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Manchester
programme.desc: The series returns to take a closer look at the most horrific crimes ever committed on British soil, starting with the May 2017 Manchester Arena bombing.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Beverly Allitt
programme.desc: Beverley Allitt was thought to be a 'model' nurse. Very astute, caring and always willing to help, why did she murder four children and attempt to kill 11 others?

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Keith Blakelock
programme.desc: In 1985, PC Keith Blakelock was murdered during a riot on a housing estate in London, triggered after a black woman died of heart failure during a house search. Nobody has been brought to justice for his murder, despite three investigations.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Joanne Dennehy
programme.desc: Dermot Murnaghan returns to uncover the truth behind the horrific crimes of Peterborough serial killer Joanna Dennehy.

programme.title: Wildest India: The Himalayas: Surviving the Summits
programme.desc: The Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India. he Himalayas' rugged highlands offer little direct refuge to humans, in the shadow below, over a billion people in India rely on the mountains for survival.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Lake Turkana: Land of the Crocodile
programme.desc: The largest of Africa's Rift valley lakes, Lake Turkana is at the heart of one of the harshest landscapes on the planet. Despite its hostile environment, man and beast have both worked out a way to survive.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Sri Lanka: Monsoon Island
programme.desc: Lying like a teardrop in the Indian Ocean, Sri Lanka is an island that defies convention. Poised just six degrees above the equator, it's less than 75,000 km sq in size. But it has enough wildlife to rival a continent.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Pantanal: Brazil's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Every year the Pantanal is drowned by immense floods, and then suffer severe drought. Yet, while people struggle, the Pantanal hosts some of the greatest gatherings of animals on the planet.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Red Desert
programme.desc: In this episode of Wild Places, we join botanist Peter Latz, who believes the biggest influence on the Australian arid landscape has been fire. Years ago, Peter wondered how different this country would have looked like without the influence of it.
